Export.zv: Cache for UNIX (Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86-64) 2014.1.3 (Build 775)
Export.Routine: DVPDRGB ;DALOI/BNT - Digital Veterans Platform ;10/01/17 15:30 ;;1.0;DIGITAL VETERANS PLATFORM;****; ;;Per VHA Directive 2004-038, this routine should not be modified. ; ; External References DBIA# ; ------------------- ----- ; DVPXUTL ; DATA^PSS50 4533 ; ^PSB(53.79 6298 Q ; SETPID(ITMP) ; N PAT D FHIRPAT^DVPXUTL(.PAT,ICN) M @TARGET@("results",ITMP,"subject")=PAT Q SETMULT(DVPOCL,INDEX,TYPE,ID) ; sets the multiples Q:SMRY N I,J,SIG,SPINST,ROUTE,SCHED,ADMIN,RMV,ADDITVS,SOLUTION,PREFIX S PREFIX=$S(REPTYPE="MS":"dosage",REPTYPE="MR":"dosageInstructions",1:"dosage") ; sig S (J,I)=0 F S I=$O(@DVPOCL@(INDEX,"SIG",I)) Q:'I S SIG=$G(^(I,0)) D . S J=J+1 I SIG]"" S @ROOT@(PREFIX,"text",J)=SIG ; Special Instructions S (J,I)=0 F S I=$O(@DVPOCL@(INDEX,"SIO",I)) Q:'I S SPINST=$G(^(I,0)) D . S J=J+1 I SPINST]"" S @ROOT@(PREFIX,"patientInstructions",J)=SPINST ; Med Route Abbr. S (J,I)=0 F S I=$O(@DVPOCL@(INDEX,"MDR",I)) Q:'I S ROUTE=$G(^(I,0)) D . S J=J+1 I ROUTE]"" S @ROOT@(PREFIX,"route",J)=ROUTE ; Schedule S (J,I)=0 F S I=$O(@DVPOCL@(INDEX,"SCH",I)) Q:'I S SCHED=$G(^(I,0)) D . N SCHEDULE D SIG2FHIR^DVPXUTL(SCHED,.SCHEDULE) . S J=J+1 I SCHED]"" M @ROOT@(PREFIX)=SCHEDULE ; Administration Times S (J,I)=0 F S I=$O(@DVPOCL@(INDEX,"ADM",I)) Q:'I S ADMIN=$G(^(I,0)) D . N CNT,ADM F CNT=1:1:100 S ADM=$P(ADMIN,"-",CNT) Q:ADM="" D . . I $L(ADM)=2 S ADM=ADM_":00" . . I $L(ADM)=4 S ADM=$E(ADM,1,2)_":"_$E(ADM,3,4) . . S J=J+1,@ROOT@(PREFIX,"timing","repeat","timeOfDay",J)=ADM ; Additives S (J,I)=0 F S I=$O(@DVPOCL@(INDEX,"A",I)) Q:'I S ADDITVS=$G(^(I,0)) D . S J=J+1 . I $P(ADDITVS,U)]"" S @ROOT@("additiveName",J)=$P(ADDITVS,U) . I $P(ADDITVS,U,2)]"" S @ROOT@("additiveAmount",J)=$P(ADDITVS,U,2) . I $P(ADDITVS,U,3)]"" S @ROOT@("additiveBottle",J)=$P(ADDITVS,U,3) ; Solutions S (J,I)=0 F S I=$O(@DVPOCL@(INDEX,"B",I)) Q:'I S SOLUTION=$G(^(I,0)) D . S J=J+1 . I $P(SOLUTION,U)]"" S @ROOT@("solutionName",J)=$P(SOLUTION,U) . I $P(SOLUTION,U,2)]"" D . . N VAL,UNIT,IX S IX=$F($P(SOLUTION,U,2)," ") S VAL=$E($P(SOLUTION,U,2),1,IX-1),UNIT=$E($P(SOLUTION,U,2),IX,99) . . N RTMP S RTMP=$NA(@ROOT@("dosageInstructions","maxDosePerAdministration")) . . S @RTMP@("value")=VAL,@RTMP@("unit")=UNIT Q ; SETZERO(X,TYPE,ID) ; sets the zero node N VAL,UNIT,IX,PREFIX S PREFIX=$S(REPTYPE="MS":"dosage",REPTYPE="MR":"dosageInstructions",1:"dosage") I REPTYPE="MS",$P(X,U,4)]"" S @ROOT@("effective","endDate")=$$FHIRDTTM^DVPXUTL($P(X,U,4)),@ROOT@("dateAsserted")=$$FHIRDTTM^DVPXUTL($P(X,U,10)) I $P(X,U,9)]"" S @ROOT@("status")=$P(X,U,9) ;W !,"STATUS: "_$P(X,U,9) I REPTYPE="MS",$P(X,U,15)]"" S @ROOT@("effective","startDate")=$$FHIRDTTM^DVPXUTL($P(X,U,15)) I $P(X,U,3)]"" D . I $F($P(X,U,3),"INFUSE OVER") S $P(X,U,3)=$E($P(X,U,3),13,99) . S IX=$F($P(X,U,3)," ") S VAL=$$TRIM^XLFSTR($E($P(X,U,3),1,IX-1)),UNIT=$$LOW^XLFSTR($E($P(X,U,3),IX,99)) . N RTMP S RTMP=$NA(@ROOT@(PREFIX,"rate","rateQuantity")) . S @RTMP@("value")=VAL,@RTMP@("unit")=UNIT I REPTYPE="MR",$P(X,U,6)]"" D . N MXDS S MXDS=$P(X,U,6) . N RTMP S RTMP=$NA(@ROOT@(PREFIX,"maxDosePerAdministration")) . S @RTMP@("value")=+MXDS . S @RTMP@("unit")=$$LOW^XLFSTR($E(MXDS,$F(MXDS,+MXDS)+1,$L(MXDS))) . N RTMP S RTMP=$NA(@ROOT@(PREFIX,"dispenseRequest")) . I $P(X,U,5)'="" S @RTMP@("numberOfRepeatsAllowed")=$P(X,U,5) . I $P(X,U,12)'="" S @RTMP@("quantity")=$P(X,U,12) . I $P(X,U,11)'="" S @RTMP@("expectedSupplyDuration")=$P(X,U,11) . I $P(X,U,11)'="" S @RTMP@("expirationDate")=$$FHIRDTTM^DVPXUTL($P(X,U,4)) I $P(X,U,7)]"" S @ROOT@(PREFIX,"dose","doseQuantity")=$P(X,U,7) Q ; PSDRUG(DRUG,INDEX,IENFM) ; Get Drug Data N EXIT,DRGNM S EXIT=0 I '$G(IENFM) S @ROOT@("medication","display")=DRUG G SKIP D Q:EXIT G SKIP . N ARRAY D GETS^DIQ(53.1,IENFM,"**","I","ARRAY") . N IX S IX="",IX=$O(ARRAY(53.11,IX)) I IX'="" S IX=ARRAY(53.11,IX,.01,"I") . I +IX D . . N PX S PX=$$GET1^DIQ(50,IX_",",22,"I") . . S @ROOT@("medication","display")=$$GET1^DIQ(50,IX_",",22) . . S DRUG=PX . I '+IX S @ROOT@("medication","display")=DRUG,EXIT=1 S DRGNM=DRUG,DRUG=$O(^PSDRUG("B",DRUG,0)) Q:'+DRUG S @ROOT@("medication","display")=DRGNM SKIP ; N VAPROD,VUID K ^TMP($J,"DRUG") D DATA^PSS50(DRUG,"","","","","DRUG") Q:'$D(^TMP($J,"DRUG",0)) 0 S VAPROD=$G(^TMP($J,"DRUG",DRUG,22)) I VAPROD="" S VAPROD=DRUG_U_$G(^TMP($J,"DRUG",DRUG,.01)),VUID=$$VUID^DVPXUTL(+VAPROD,50.68) E S VUID=$$VUID^DVPXUTL(+VAPROD,50.68) K ARY D FHIRMED^DVPXUTL(.ARY,VUID,"V") M @ROOT@("medication")=ARY Q ; PROVIDER(PRV,UID,FLD,TYPE,INDEX) ; Get Provider Specs N X,PROVUID S X=$$PROVSPC^DVPXUTL(+PRV) N REC D FHIRPRC^DVPXUTL(.REC,+PRV) M @ROOT@("recorder")=REC Q ; RXSLOOP(SFILE,RXIEN,NODE,TYPE,INDEX) ; Loop through subfiles and get field names and values I $G(RXUID)="" S RXUID=$$SETUID^DVPXUTL(DVPSTN,DFN,RXIEN,"52") N X,SFLD,SFLDNAME S X=0 F S X=$O(@RXDAT@(DFN,RXIEN,FLD,X)) Q:'X D . S SFLD=0 F S SFLD=$O(@RXDAT@(DFN,RXIEN,FLD,X,SFLD)) Q:'SFLD D . . I $D(@RXDAT@(DFN,RXIEN,FLD,X,SFLD))=1 D Q . . . S SFLDNAME=$$GETFLD^DVPUTL(SFILE,SFLD) . . . I SFLDNAME]"#" S SFLDNAME=$REPLACE(SFLDNAME,"#",$S($E(SFLDNAME,1)="#":"NUMBER ",1:" NUMBER ")) . . . S SFLDNAME=$TR(SFLDNAME,"-_/"," ") . . . S SFLDNAME=$$CONVERT^DVPUTL(SFLDNAME) . . . I SFLDNAME]"",@RXDAT@(DFN,RXIEN,FLD,X,SFLD)]"" S @ROOT@(NODE,X,SFLDNAME)=$S($P(@RXDAT@(DFN,RXIEN,FLD,X,SFLD),U,2)]"":$P(@RXDAT@(DFN,RXIEN,FLD,X,SFLD),U,2),1:@RXDAT@(DFN,RXIEN,FLD,X,SFLD)) Q ; TAKEN(REC,OID) ;Check if UD or IV was "taken" and return value and history ; returns the FHIR code in the $$ and the history in the REC array (due to JSON CONVERTOR arrays) N TDT,IDX,ZERO,TKN,TKNCD,CNT S CNT=0 S TDT="",TDT=$O(^PSB(53.79,"AORDX",DFN,OID,TDT)) Q:TDT="" "unk" S IDX="" F S IDX=$O(^PSB(53.79,"AORDX",DFN,OID,TDT,IDX)) Q:IDX="" D . S CNT=CNT+1,ZERO=$G(^PSB(53.79,IDX,0)),TKN=$P(ZERO,U,9) . S TKNCD=$S(TKN="G":"GIVEN",TNK="H":"HELD",TKN="R":"REFUSED",TKN="N":"NOT GIVEN",TKN="RM":"REMOVED",TKN="I":"INFUSING",TKN="S":"STOPPED",TKN="C":"COMPLETED",TKN="M":"MISSING DOSE",1:"UNKNOWN") . S:(TKN="G")!(TKN="C") TKN="y" . S REC(CNT,"status")=TKNCD,REC(CNT,"timestamp")=$$FHIRDTTM^DVPXUTL(TDT) Q:CNT=0 "unk" S:TKN'="y" TKN="n" Q TKN ; SETID ; S @ROOT@("id")=+$P(@DVPOCL@(ITMP,0),U) Q
